plugins.name: crbiz-pm
plugins.description: CRBiz PM for Claude Code. PM-as-Configuration-Overlay grammar with reference implementations of the Catalyst-app and discovery-strategy archetypes. Install-anywhere, bidirectional HTML board, chip-spawn wrapper, Tie-back protocol, lean PM context. v2.0 of the PM-on-CC discipline. 19 skills + 6 agents + 18 commands.

plugins.name: pm-board-keeper
plugins.description: DEPRECATED in favour of crbiz-pm v2.0 (which lifts the pm-board skill + pm-board-keeper agent + 6 pm-board-* commands). Stand up and maintain a single-file HTML PM dashboard (docs/board.html) for chip-spawn workflows.
